channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: President Ruto Orders Review of Insurance and Auctioneer Laws
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: President Ruto has initiated a major regulatory overhaul of the Insurance and Auctioneers Acts to stop delayed claims and predatory vehicle seizures.
item.content:encoded: President Ruto has initiated a major regulatory overhaul of the Insurance and Auctioneers Acts to stop delayed claims and predatory vehicle seizures.

item.title: Mwalimu Rachel Discusses Year Long Co-Parenting Arrangement
item.dc:creator: Martin Kihara
item.description: Media personality Mwalimu Rachel shares details on her intentional co-parenting strategy involving a temporary shift in primary custody for her son.
item.content:encoded: Media personality Mwalimu Rachel shares details on her intentional co-parenting strategy involving a temporary shift in primary custody for her son.

item.title: Thomas Tuchel drops Phil Foden and Cole Palmer from England squad
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel has excluded Phil Foden and Cole Palmer from the World Cup squad, choosing players based on current form over reputation.
item.content:encoded: England manager Thomas Tuchel has excluded Phil Foden and Cole Palmer from the World Cup squad, choosing players based on current form over reputation.

item.title: Suspect Arrested Over Murder of Gospel Singer Rachel Wandeto
item.dc:creator: Wanjiku Kuria
item.description: DCI detectives have apprehended Josiah Njeru Njiri in connection with the fatal arson attack on gospel artist Rachel Wandeto in Mwiki, Nairobi.
item.content:encoded: DCI detectives have apprehended Josiah Njeru Njiri in connection with the fatal arson attack on gospel artist Rachel Wandeto in Mwiki, Nairobi.

item.title: Stephen Colbert signs off as The Late Show ends after ten years
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Stephen Colbert has concluded his decade-long tenure on The Late Show with a final star-studded episode as CBS cancels the iconic program.
item.content:encoded: Stephen Colbert has concluded his decade-long tenure on The Late Show with a final star-studded episode as CBS cancels the iconic program.
